scripts.electron:dev: ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter frontend run build && pnpm run rebuild:electron && electron .
scripts.electron:prepare: bash -c 'rm -rf .electron-build/server && mkdir -p .electron-build/server && rsync -a --exclude node_modules --exclude data --exclude uploads --exclude .env --exclude __tests__ --exclude jest.config.js --exclude coverage server/ .electron-build/server/ && cd .electron-build/server && npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts && cd ../.. && npx @electron/rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3 -m .electron-build/server && mv .electron-build/server/node_modules .electron-build/server/deps'
scripts.electron:build:intel: ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter frontend run build && pnpm run electron:prepare && BUILD_ARCH=x64 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js && pnpm run dmg:create:intel
scripts.electron:build:m: ELECTRON_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter frontend run build && pnpm run electron:prepare && BUILD_ARCH=arm64 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js && pnpm run dmg:create:m
scripts.dmg:create:intel: bash -c 'DMG_TMP=$(mktemp -d) && cp -R release/mac/员工管理系统.app "$DMG_TMP/" && ln -s /Applications "$DMG_TMP/Applications" && hdiutil create -volname 员工管理系统 -srcfolder "$DMG_TMP" -ov -format UDZO release/员工管理系统-$(node -p "require(\"./package.json\").version")-x64.dmg && rm -rf "$DMG_TMP"'
scripts.dmg:create:m: bash -c 'DMG_TMP=$(mktemp -d) && cp -R release/mac-arm64/员工管理系统.app "$DMG_TMP/" && ln -s /Applications "$DMG_TMP/Applications" && hdiutil create -volname 员工管理系统 -srcfolder "$DMG_TMP" -ov -format UDZO release/员工管理系统-$(node -p "require(\"./package.json\").version")-arm64.dmg && rm -rf "$DMG_TMP"'
